headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -113.0)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 71% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly decreased (z=-2.13)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 173 quotes and an overwhelming 148 at strong intensity, driving the score to 101.8 — people are venting forcefully today.
• This is near the top of the 152-day range for Frustrations (ceiling at 166.2), making today one of the most frustrated days on record.
• Fears recovered notably from yesterday's low of -50.5 to -21.1, while Optimism dipped further and remains stuck near the bottom of its historical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
